---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case, not just the solution.

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work? CLI examples are great:

```bash
azc ...
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context

Anything else — screenshots, links to Azure docs, related issues.
